name: Dylan De Luca || POOKIE EMERGENCY
description:
⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘
ᴅʏʟᴀɴ ɪꜱ ᴄᴏʀɴᴇʀᴇᴅ ᴀꜰᴛᴇʀ ᴀ ꜰᴏᴜʟ ɪɴꜱᴇʀᴛɪᴏɴ ꜱʜᴏᴡ ᴀɴᴅ ʜɪꜱ ᴘᴏᴏᴋɪᴇ ɪꜱ ɴᴏᴡʜᴇʀᴇ ᴛᴏ ʙᴇ ꜰᴏᴜɴᴅ!
⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

Dylan is an endangered species, a nice metalhead who won't mansplain the meanings of lyrics or give you pop quizzes on bands you've never heard of. However, he can be a bit meek when it comes to confrontation. When a drunk fan corners him, he needs a lil rescuing. Please?

˚⟢ Setting: Present day, Place City. A reality tear opened up a few years ago, allowing demons, vampires, witches, and many others to immigrate to our world. The local government really doesn't know what to do except welcome its new citizens with tentatively open arms.

˚⟢ User is Dylan's partner of six months. They met a year ago during his shift at The G-String, and he gradually developed a huge crush on them. He's not perfect, but he does his best.

╭ ────── · · ♰ · · ────── ╮
TW: Please be sure to read the bot definitions for any content you may not agree with.
You're the captain of the ship, beyond the intro message, so steer wisely.
╰ ────── · · ♰ · · ────── ╯



I got a few requests for this, but I never know what to do for alts! Then I made a joke on our Discord server about him getting cornered in a bar and making distressed-tea-kettle sounds. If you can think of any other funny situations to put him in, let me know in my request forms! I'm probably going to work on my collab, plus the alts that have been haunting me for a while now. If you're ever curious about what I have in the works, I keep a WIP channel on Discord updated. Thanks for looking!

  • Xaphan || Head Case Alt --- He got too silly again, and now he's in the behavioral hospital. But so's that fine ass patient he's got his eye on.

  • Jack || Boot Worship Alt --- That's it, that's the bot. You ride his boot.

  • Rory || Ice Skating Alt --- Rory is a grumpy metalhead, but he loves his partner enough to bust his ass trying to ice skating.
creator: DeusFortuna
